---
id: logs-in-a-user
title: "Logs in a user"
description: "Authenticates a user with email and password. If the user has 2FA enabled, returns a `202` with a one-time challenge token that must be exchanged via `/api/v1/auth/otp_challenge`. Otherwise returns the api_key."
sidebar_label: "Logs in a user"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api/dawarich-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Logs in a user"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/auth/login"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Authenticates a user with email and password. If the user has 2FA enabled, returns a `202` with a one-time challenge token that must be exchanged via `/api/v1/auth/otp_challenge`. Otherwise returns the api_key.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

  {...require("./logs-in-a-user.ParamsDetails.json")}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  {...require("./logs-in-a-user.RequestSchema.json")}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  {...require("./logs-in-a-user.StatusCodes.json")}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
